findings: Depth Guard is present: the Worker Depth Lock block forbids task-tool use and child spawning by leaf workers
bounded spawning is explicitly constrained with max_workers=250, squads_allocated=50, and max_depth=3
partial/failed status contract exists: commanders must report partial when gates prevent full launch and failed if no squad leads launch
banned-child-model safety is enforced in the launcher with a hard exit on banned models and the ban list is exported to commanders
child failure containment is visible in swarm-state counters and child-agents ledger failure events
gap: there is no explicit shell-level stuck-launch timeout for commander child spawning; the 90s capsule timeout is advisory only
gap: STAMPEDE_METASWARM_NO_GATES=1 can disable local circuit breakers, leaving only platform limits as a backstop
